message:
Add images support to tool-call messages

- Pi converter: Extract images from tool results and add to message.images
- Claudecode converter: Extract images from sanitized output to message.images
- Schema: Add images array to tool-call message schema
- Ingest: Select preview image from user OR tool-call messages
- UI: Render images underneath ALL tool calls at call site
- Add pi image fixture with OpenAI logo test case

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/kk3ruxqu0x61kv8y1zh2rust

files.patch:
@@ -52,6 +52,7 @@ const toolCallMessageSchema = z.object({
   toolName: z.string().nullable(),
   input: z.unknown().optional(),
   output: z.unknown().optional(),
+  images: z.array(imageReferenceSchema).optional(),
   error: z.string().optional(),
   isError: z.union([z.boolean(), z.string()]).optional(),
   id: z.string().optional(),
